// Inlined environment variables removed for security. Provide these via runtime
// environment variables (import.meta.env or process.env). Hardcoded credentials
// were redacted.
const StrictMode = __vite__cjsImport0_react["StrictMode"];const createRoot = __vite__cjsImport1_reactDom_client["createRoot"];const _jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport4_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];import __vite__cjsImport0_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=c47ce50e";
import __vite__cjsImport1_reactDom_client from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-dom_client.js?v=c47ce50e";
import "/src/styles/theme.css?t=1780326927911";
import App from "/src/App.tsx?t=1780326927911";
var _jsxFileName = "D:/Coding Folder/dailystack/dailystack-frontend/src/main.tsx";
import __vite__cjsImport4_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=c47ce50e";
// Dev-only diagnostics: log Supabase credentials and intercept fetch to show endpoints
if (import.meta.env && import.meta.env.MODE !== "production") {
	try {
		// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
		const creds = (await import("/src/app/services/supabaseClient.ts")).getSupabaseCredentials?.();
		console.debug("[DEV DIAG] getSupabaseCredentials()", creds);
	} catch {}
	// Wrap global fetch to log outgoing network requests (dev only)
	try {
		const _origFetch = window.fetch;
		window.fetch = async function(input, init) {
			try {
				console.debug("[DEV DIAG] fetch:", typeof input === "string" ? input : input.url, init && init.headers ? init.headers : null);
			} catch {}
			// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
			return _origFetch.call(this, input, init);
		};
	} catch {}
}
createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render(/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(StrictMode, { children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(App, {}, void 0, false, {
	fileName: _jsxFileName,
	lineNumber: 34,
	columnNumber: 5
}, this) }, void 0, false, {
	fileName: _jsxFileName,
	lineNumber: 33,
	columnNumber: 3
}, this));
